prose: TEMPO frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap was calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell doublet for the N-centered radical). Geometry: fixed single-point on user-supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz (29 atoms). SCF converged in 12 cycles; integrity checks passed. Frontier-orbital energies: HOMO = −6.3375 eV, LUMO = −2.4651 eV. The HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy) is 3.8724 eV. Command: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --mult 2 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz.
